Name: BEHAVIOR_PARAM
Description: Defines AI behavior actions, attack properties, damage references, projectile usage, reload timings, and movement/combat tuning.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Damage ID 1
Fields.Description: Damage parameter ID used for the first damage slot of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Damage ID 2
Fields.Description: Damage parameter ID used for the second damage slot of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Damage ID 3
Fields.Description: Damage parameter ID used for the third damage slot of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Grab Damage ID 1
Fields.Description: Throw/grab damage parameter ID used for the first slot of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Grab Damage ID 2
Fields.Description: Throw/grab damage parameter ID used for the second slot of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Grab Damage ID 3
Fields.Description: Throw/grab damage parameter ID used for the third slot of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Walking Attack ID
Fields.Description: Attack behavior ID used while moving/walking during action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Interrupt Immunity Type
Fields.Description: Determines the interruption resistance or invincibility type during action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Attack Hand
Fields.Description: Specifies which hand or weapon slot is used for action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Is Spell
Fields.Description: Determines whether action 0 is treated as a spell action.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Melee Control Type
Fields.Description: Defines the melee/blade control behavior type for action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Bullet ID 1
Fields.Description: Projectile/Bullet parameter ID used for the first slot of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Bullet ID 2
Fields.Description: Projectile/Bullet parameter ID used for the second slot of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Bullet ID 3
Fields.Description: Projectile/Bullet parameter ID used for the third slot of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Shot Stance Time
Fields.Description: Time spent preparing or aiming before firing during action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Walking Attack Range
Fields.Description: Effective attack range while performing a walking attack during action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Attack Startup Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Speed multiplier applied to the startup/wind-up phase of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Attack Recovery Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Speed multiplier applied to the recovery/follow-through phase of action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Position Prediction Time
Fields.Description: Prediction time used for future target position estimation during action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Angle Correction [deg]
Fields.Description: Angular correction applied to targeting or attack direction during action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Rotation Interpolation Start Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Distance at which rotation interpolation begins during action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Rotation Interpolation End Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Distance at which rotation interpolation ends during action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Chant SFX
Fields.Description: Sound effect ID played for chanting/casting during action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Minimum Reload Time
Fields.Description: Minimum reload/cooldown duration for action 0.

Fields.Name: Action 0: Maximum Reload Time
Fields.Description: Maximum reload/cooldown duration for action 0.
